CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2016 Off Calendar

MOTION / Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher Tuttle of The Chanler Group telephone number 510-848-8880 for Plaintiff John Moore.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JOHN MOORE'S MOTION To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)
